title: Flaky Fiery Algerian Skirt Steak Kebabs
description: A salty and flaky weeknight Algerian dish featuring skirt steak, cooked in a tandoor and Whole30-friendly, perfect for a quick dinner
instructions: Preheat the tandoor to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, ginger, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper
Add the skirt steak pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the marinated steak pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Brush the harissa onto the steak pieces
Place the skewers in the tandoor and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the steak reaches an internal temperature of 130 degrees Fahrenheit
Remove the skewers from the tandoor and let rest for 5 minutes
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro
